name: Skeleton
description: Single tonal placeholder block painted on `sys.color.surfaceContainerHighest` with a slow opacity pulse (`0.5 ŌåÆ 1 ŌåÆ 0.5` over 1.6s). Three shapes select the default footprint and corner radius: `text` (16px high, full-width ŌĆö single line of body copy), `block` (80px high, full-width ŌĆö image / card body) and `circle` (40 ├Ś 40, fully rounded ŌĆö avatar). Consumer-supplied `width` / `height` props override the default footprint. Compose multiple Skeletons inside `SkeletonGroup` to mirror the rhythm of the content being loaded.

shape.description: Selects the default footprint and corner radius. `text` and `block` paint as a `sys.radius.xs` corner; `circle` ignores radius and renders as a perfect round.

width.description: Overrides the default inline footprint. Numbers are coerced to `px`; strings pass through (`100%`, `'12rem'`, ŌĆ”). When omitted, `text` and `block` stretch to 100% of the host; `circle` keeps a 40 ├Ś 40 footprint.

height.description: Overrides the default block footprint. Numbers are coerced to `px`. When omitted, `text` is 16px, `block` is 80px, `circle` is 40px.

aria-label.description: Accessible label announced by screen readers. Defaults to `'Loading'`.

container.description: Tonal block. `sys.color.surfaceContainerHighest` fill, shape-dependent radius, no stroke. Carries the pulse animation. `role='status'` + `aria-live='polite'` so screen readers announce the loading state without yanking focus.

default.note: The only fill tone ŌĆö Skeleton has no emphasis axis. The pulse modulates opacity, not hue, so the placeholder stays anonymous against any host surface.
Opacity oscillates between `sys.state.skeleton.min` (0.5) and 1. The animation respects `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` ŌĆö pulse halts and the block stays at full opacity.

behavior.ariaLive: Container carries `role='status'` and `aria-live='polite'` so screen readers announce the loading state without interrupting the user's current focus. The visible block is decorative ŌĆö the announcement comes from `aria-label` (defaults to `'Loading'`).
behavior.reducedMotion: Under `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` the pulse animation is suppressed entirely; the block stays at full opacity.
behavior.footprintOverrides: `width` / `height` props win over the shape's default footprint, including for `circle` (a circle Skeleton at `width=60 height=60` stays a 60-rung round).

forbidden: skeleton fill stepped to `sys.color.primary` or any chromatic tone ŌĆö the placeholder must read as anonymous chrome, not as a content tone
shimmer / gradient sweep animation ŌĆö Chorus skeletons modulate opacity only (one motion axis keeps the tier readable under reduced-motion fallback)
skeleton stacked vertically without a SkeletonGroup wrapper ŌĆö group via SkeletonGroup so the 8px gap stays consistent across compositions
skeleton kept on-screen after the real content resolves ŌĆö the placeholder must swap out atomically, not cross-fade with the loaded data
skeleton used as a permanent low-priority placeholder (empty-state / no-data illustration) ŌĆö that role is an inline illustration + body copy, not a pulsing placeholder
